visual_description: A dark sedan with headlights on drives down a narrow, wet street at night, flanked by pedestrians walking on either side. Buildings line both sides of the street, with some covered in tarps and illuminated signs, while a golden temple spire is visible in the distance. One pedestrian walks toward the camera, while another stands near the left side of the road, partially obscured by shadows.
audio_description: The audio features a male voice with a moderate pitch and a steady pace, accompanied by a noticeable gasp at the beginning.
